sentences.english: Most people rank public speaking as one of their biggest fears even above death.
sentences.korean: 대부분의 사람은 대중 연설을 죽음보다 더 큰 두려움으로 꼽아요.

sentences.english: But the good news is that it's a skill that can be learned and improved with practice.
sentences.korean: 하지만 좋은 소식은 연습으로 배우고 향상시킬 수 있는 기술이라는 거예요.

sentences.english: The most important tip is to know your material inside out so you don't depend on reading from notes.
sentences.korean: 가장 중요한 팁은 자료를 완벽히 알아서 메모를 읽는 데 의존하지 않는 거예요.

sentences.english: Making eye contact with your audience and speaking slowly helps you appear confident even when you're nervous.
sentences.korean: 청중과 눈을 맞추고 천천히 말하면 긴장하고 있어도 자신감 있어 보이는 데 도움이 돼요.

sentences.english: Remember that the audience wants you to succeed — they are on your side not against you.
sentences.korean: 청중은 당신이 성공하기를 원한다는 걸 기억하세요 — 당신 편이지 적이 아니에요.

quiz.question: What does '대중 연설' mean in English?
